text:
COMMENT: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has updated the Medicare enrollment source 
data for the Master Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF). As of March 2017, the MBSF includes Medicare 
enrollment information from the CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) rather than the 
Enrollment Database (EDB). Data from the two sources was nearly identical. The CME improves the 
identification of Medicare Part B enrollment and also allows for more timely release of the MBSF.
